{
  "claims": [
    "Assembly Bill 319 will create protections for mobile home residents by strengthening conflict-of-interest practices for mobile home inspectors.",
    "Assembly Bill 1109 addresses teen suicide by restricting the sale of sodium nitrite to minors.",
    "Young people have increasingly been purchasing sodium nitrite online for the purpose of committing suicide.",
    "AB 319 requires the Department of Housing and Community Development to review mobile home park inspector's statements of economic interests.",
